case_title: CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. VS. DONALD E. NEWMAN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITON TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. AS TO RESPONDENT NEWMAN, DONALD E. NEW MAN INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
